title: Layout primitive contract
description: Canonical definition of the shared layout primitive (Stack) per framework target.

layout.description: Framework-neutral layout facts the emitters lower into idiomatic per-target primitives. The class prefix, display map, axis map, and gap token binding live here so no emitter carries hand-authored Stack lore.

classPrefix.description: BEM block name for the primitive's layout classes (e.g. "stack"). Emitters derive block/modifier class names from this; consumers never depend on it.

displayByMode.description: layoutMode value -> CSS display value. `null` means the host keeps its own display (the `native` mode).

axisByVariant.description: layoutVariant value -> CSS flex-direction, applied only under the axis-bearing display modes (stack / inline-stack).

gap.description: Token-driven inter-child spacing. `cssVar` is the resolved semantic token custom property the primitive's gap reads from; there is no free-form spacing prop.

token.description: Source semantic token path (documentation of provenance), e.g. spacing.gap.stack.

cssVar.description: Resolved CSS custom property the gap reads, e.g. --fsds-semantic-spacing-gap-stack.

module.description: Published import path for application code.

relativeFromComponents.description: Relative path from each generated component folder to the primitive module.
